extraction.one_line_summary: FORTUNATO Lorenzo soloed to victory after dropping TRATNIK Jan with 2km to go on the Zoncolan, while BERNAL Egan extended his GC lead.
tactical_patterns: VLASOV team Astana burned energy controlling early, then cracked late; proxy pacing for non-leaders backfires on mountain finishes.
TRATNIK Jan attacked before main climb started, forcing bridging efforts; early aggression from breakaway domestiques creates selection before favorites engage.
BERNAL Egan's team allowed descent splits to form after penultimate climb, forcing rivals to expend energy regaining contact before final ascent.
YATES Simon attacked with 2km remaining but BERNAL countered on steeper gradients; launching before maximum gradient favors sustained power over explosive climbing.

rider_signals.FORTUNATO Lorenzo: positive: First Grand Tour win from breakaway, dropped experienced TRATNIK on 20%+ gradients with 2km to go
rider_signals.BERNAL Egan: positive: Controlled all attacks, gained time on all GC rivals except YATES, extended pink jersey lead to 1:30
rider_signals.YATES Simon: positive: Only rider to match BERNAL's acceleration, limited losses to 11 seconds on summit finish
rider_signals.VLASOV Aleksandr: negative: Lost over one minute after his team controlled early; proxy pacing strategy backfired completely
rider_signals.NIBALI Vincenzo: negative: Dropped with 2km to go on final climb, described as 'off day' suggests form declining
rider_signals.TRATNIK Jan: positive: Initiated decisive breakaway move before main climb, held second until final 2km against specialist climbers
rider_signals.CARUSO Damiano: positive: Finished in top group, maintained third on GC despite aggressive racing
rider_signals.MARTÍNEZ Daniel Felipe: positive: Moved up GC standings, finished in top ten on selective mountain finish
rider_signals.BOUCHARD Geoffrey: neutral: Remained in early break longer than most, still holds top ten GC position
rider_signals.CICCONE Giulio: positive: Moved up to eighth on GC, finished with main favorites group
